scripts.start: concurrently --names "shared-backend,students-frontend,teachers-frontend" -c "yellow.bold,green.bold,blue.bold," "cd ./shared-backend/ && npm run start" "cd ./students-frontend/ && npm run build-only && npm run preview" "cd ./teachers-frontend/ && npm run build-only && npm run preview"
scripts.setup: npm i && concurrently --names "shared-backend,students-frontend,teachers-frontend" -c "yellow.bold,green.bold,blue.bold," "cd ./shared-backend/ && npm i" "cd ./students-frontend/ && npm i" "cd ./teachers-frontend/ && npm i"
